summary: Build complete. 6/6 sections + integrator verified under inline dispatch. S6 harness ran the integrated .sdPlugin bundle against a fake SDK WebSocket on free ports, with the AppleScript boundary shimmed via MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var only — 28/28 assertions passed including PNV.1 (real plugin process captured 'Bohemian Rhapsody'/'Queen' as a setFeedback frame addressed to the willAppear'd context). The deliverable is at output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/. Two inline deviations logged: dev-001 (PI path resolved in favor of contract C-S1-S2) and dev-002 (MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var test-affordance in music_source.js; contract C-S4-S5 unchanged).
